description: Concurrent edit guard not implemented per REQ-006. REQ-006 requires blocking feed row click when the full EditorPanel is editing the same note: 'When editingNoteId === noteId AND editingStatus === "editing", the row is considered rowDisabled. The click does NOT enter edit mode.' The isFeedRowClickBlocked function at feedRowPredicates.ts:17-26 only checks editingStatus ∈ {'saving','switching'} and loadingStatus === 'loading'. It does not block when editingStatus === 'editing' with a matching noteId. No per-row guard exists in handleRowClick (FeedRow.svelte:218-221) beyond the generic rowDisabled check.

secondaryEvidence.description: rowDisabled derives from isFeedRowClickBlocked only — no per-row editingNoteId match check
handleRowClick only checks rowDisabled, not concurrent EditorPanel conflict
Spec requirement: 'When editingNoteId === noteId AND editingStatus === "editing", the row is considered rowDisabled'
